title: Keystone Expansion Pufferfish's Skills
description: MMO-style skill tree expansion for Puffish Skills, adding new progression categories like Combat, Mining, Exploration, Farming, Crafting, Building, Magic and Taming.
body:
## Keystone Expansion — MMORPG Skill Trees Addon

**Keystone Expansion** is an **MMORPG-inspired skill tree expansion** for **Puffish Skills**, built to add **long-term progression**, **build variety**, and satisfying **endgame power** to survival modpacks.

This project adds multiple custom categories with large, interconnected trees and meaningful upgrades (health, resistance, stamina, luck, XP gain, mobility, damage, and more). The goal is a “hack & slash / MMO” progression feeling: early upgrades are subtle, but the more you invest, the more your character becomes noticeably stronger.

### Main Features

- **8 progression categories**:
  - Combat
  - Mining
  - Exploration / Mobility
  - Farming
  - Crafting / Artisan
  - Building / Architecture
  - Magic / Alchemy / Enchant
  - Taming / Companions
- **MMO-style scaling**: long-term leveling curves, endgame milestones and **keystones**
- **Synergy-focused trees**: multiple paths and playstyles (tank, mobility, sustain, luck/XP, etc.)
- **Addon-friendly**: made to be used inside modpacks and servers

### Required Dependencies

**This addon will NOT work without the following required mods installed:**

- **[Puffish Skills](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/puffish-skills)** (Required)  
- **[Puffish Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/puffish-attributes)** (Required)  

### Compatibility

- Designed for **Forge / Fabric / NeoForge**
- Works as an addon for modpacks / servers using Puffish Skills

### Notes

- This project does not replace Puffish Skills — it **extends it** with additional categories and custom trees.
- Balancing can vary depending on your modpack difficulty and progression speed.

*Enjoy the grind — and the dopamine when your build finally pops off.*
